coverage.scope_note: v2 numbers are PLang/ scope only (76.7% global). v1 reported global 36.5% but included other assemblies; not directly comparable.

PLang/App/Utils/TypeConverter.cs.note: auto-wrap branch covered; many other paths still untested

PLang/App/modules/builder/providers/Defa.note: FormatValue InvariantCulture branch added but no non-Invariant test exercises it

closed_strong.title: BuildingGuardTests
closed_strong.how: Tests deleted; per-action guard intentionally not restored. 4 enforcement layers verified to still gate: Variables.Resolve, DefaultFileProvider .pr-write, Actor setup, App shutdown.

closed_strong.title: Gap 2 file.read ResolveVariables
closed_strong.how: 3 tests in FileHandlerTests, deletion-test verified — skipInfrastructure guard exercises real %!app.Id% DynamicData resolution path. Coverage 62.5% → 100%.

closed_strong.title: ErrorHandle retry weak
closed_strong.how: Stateful-lambda + callCount==1+retryCount pin. Replacing retry loop with no-op fails test.

closed_strong.title: If 404 identity
closed_strong.how: Pinned StatusCode=404 + Key=NotFound (matches GoalError.NotFound at GoalError.cs:29).

closed_strong.title: ValidateResponse Null
closed_strong.how: Pinned exact production strings 'StepResults.Value is null' + 'Goal.Value is null' (validateResponse.cs:45,55).

closed_with_caveats.title: Locale format
closed_with_caveats.caveat: Production fix correct at 3 sites, but no test sets Thread.CurrentCulture=non-Invariant and asserts round-trip. Phase05_CultureInfo_DefaultsToInvariant only verifies the default. Regression risk low but real.

closed_with_caveats.title: promoteGroups + enrichResponse 0%
closed_with_caveats.caveat: XML-doc declaration of 'build-time only' is honest for enrichResponse (called from os/system/builder/BuildGoal.goal:35). promoteGroups is referenced in ZERO .goal files anywhere — not even bootstrap. Either delete or wire in.

closed_with_caveats.title: Gap 3 single→list
closed_with_caveats.caveat: 3 of 4 new tests exercise the wrap branch correctly. ListOfStringToListOfString_PassesThrough is mislabeled — its input goes through the list-conversion branch at TypeConverter:126, not the auto-wrap at line 156. Deleting the wrap branch would NOT fail it. Cosmetic only.

untouched.title: BuilderValidateValid @known unwrap
untouched.impact: ~80 'Cannot convert int = 1 (String) to Int32' errors. @known annotation strings reach Convert.ChangeType. Affects every action's parameter coercion path.

untouched.title: Loop string-concat
untouched.impact: Loop test expects 3 (arithmetic sum), gets '0 + 1 + 1 + 1' (string concat). Real runtime bug.

untouched.title: Signing cluster + others
untouched.impact: 9 signing tests; timeout.after.after routing bug (extra .after segment); Identity, UI render, ContextVars, ConditionCompound, ForeachDictionary, Event, Goal/Relative, Test/Discover, Crypto, ErrorTypes, App/SetupGoal also still red.

findings.issue: Untouched from v1 #2. ~80 'Cannot convert int = 1 (String) to Int32' errors. @known annotation strings ('int = 1', 'bool = false', 'String', 'Dictionary`2') still flow through Convert.ChangeType.
findings.impact: Build-time validation cannot validate parameter shapes when @known annotations are present.
findings.suggestion: Find the @known unwrap path and trace why it doesn't fire before parameter coercion.

findings.issue: Untouched from v1 #3. Test expects 3 (arithmetic sum), gets '0 + 1 + 1 + 1' (string concat).
findings.impact: Foreach with numeric accumulator does not produce numeric sum. Real runtime bug.

findings.test_file: Tests/Modules/Signing/* (9 reds), App/SetupGoal/Start, Identity/{Unarchive,ArchiveDefault}, Ui/Render{CallGoal,WithParams}, Variable/ContextVars, Loop/Foreach/Dictionary, Condition/Compound/Mixed, Event/{Remove,Override,Priority}, Goal/Relative, Test/Discover, Crypto/HashBcryptVerify, Error/Types
findings.issue: Untouched from v1 #4. 25 PLang test reds + 1 lowercase suite red. Real production failures introduced by the v2 builder squash 50351d8b.
findings.impact: Modules across Signing/Identity/UI/Loop/Event are broken end-to-end.
findings.suggestion: Send back to coder. Triage each cluster: are these LLM-build-output drift from non-deterministic builder, or real handler regressions?

findings.issue: F5 production fix is correct (all three sites pass CultureInfo.InvariantCulture). But no test sets Thread.CurrentCulture=non-Invariant and asserts numeric output is '3.14' not '3,14'. Phase05_CultureInfo_DefaultsToInvariant only checks the App.Culture default.
findings.impact: A regression that flipped any of the three sites back to conv.ToString() would slip through silently.
findings.suggestion: Add a unit test using a Setup that sets Thread.CurrentCulture to it-IT, calls FormatValue/FormatFormalValue/ExampleRenderer.Render with 3.14, and asserts the result is '3.14'.

findings.issue: Test comment claims 'sanity guard that auto-wrap doesn't engage on already-list inputs,' but the List<string> input is consumed by the list-conversion branch at line 126 (`value is IList sourceList`), not the auto-wrap branch at line 156. Deleting lines 156-168 would NOT fail this test.
findings.impact: Cosmetic — the test exercises a real and useful path (list-conversion), just not the path the comment claims.
findings.suggestion: Either re-comment to describe what the test actually does, or add a separate test that explicitly forces the auto-wrap-skip path (hard, given the IList check fires first).

findings.issue: Carryover from codeanalyzer v4. XML doc claims 'exercised by bootstrap cycle' but `grep -rn 'promoteGroups' os/ Tests/ tests/ --include=*.goal` returns zero matches. The action is unreachable from any goal anywhere — even bootstrap doesn't invoke it. The 'next bootstrap fails immediately' claim is not supported.
findings.impact: The new ActionError('PromoteGroupsImmutableStep') has zero verification path. Any regression to PromoteGroups produces no observable signal.
findings.suggestion: Either delete `promoteGroups` (action + module registration), or wire it into the build pipeline (`os/system/builder/ApplyStep.goal` or similar).

summary: 10 of 12 v1 findings closed cleanly with strong tests and verified deletion-test catchers. C# suite is 100% green (2288/2288). But F2/F3/F4 (25 PLang reds + 1 in lowercase suite) remain untouched — these are real production failures introduced by the v2 builder squash, not pre-existing baseline. Two minor follow-ups: locale-format coverage missing, ListOfStringToListOfString test mislabeled. PromoteGroups is unreachable from any goal anywhere — XML 'build-time only' claim is honest but the 'bootstrap fail-fast signal' claim is not.
